- npm run build: passed, exit 0, tsc -b && vite build, production bundle
    generated successfully.

  Dev-Server Smoke

  Started npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173.

  Smoke fallback passed:

  - GET /: HTTP/1.1 200 OK, page includes <title>Phone Lunk Alarm Lab</title>
    and root app mount.
  - GET /src/main.tsx: HTTP/1.1 200 OK, Content-Type: text/javascript.

  Blocker: in-app Browser control was not practical because the required Node/
  browser automation tool was unavailable after discovery. I stopped the Vite
  server afterward.

  Camera/Audio QA Evidence

  Camera path is covered in code and tests: startCamera handles missing
  getUserMedia, permission denial, no camera, success stream attach, and stop
  cleanup in src/App.tsx:92. README manual QA requires allow/deny browser
  permission checks in README.md:65.

  Audio path is covered in code and tests: enableAudioAlarm requires explicit
  Web Audio opt-in, muteAudioAlarm stops tone and sets muted, and playAlarmTone
  only runs when audio is ready and mode is not silent in src/App.tsx:145.
  README manual QA still needs audible confirmation for enable/mute behavior in
  README.md:58.

  No code issues found in this read-only pass. Remaining QA requiring a real
  browser: camera permission allow/deny prompts, live camera preview, and
  audible alarm/no-audio mute confirmation.
